dict.string: MCP EventKit needs full access to your calendars to manage calendar events through Claude or other AI assistants.
MCP EventKit needs access to your calendars to create, read, update, and delete calendar events on your behalf through Claude or other AI assistants.
MCP EventKit needs full access to your reminders to manage tasks through Claude or other AI assistants.
MCP EventKit needs access to your reminders to create, read, update, and complete tasks on your behalf through Claude or other AI assistants.
